concerns: In CampaignAndMessagePersistenceTest, the assertion expects contact3.getUsername() to be '@invalid_format_default_username' which was normalized from 'invalid_format_default_username'. While valid, username validation and auto-prepending logic should have clear schema/length/char bounds validation on the REST/DTO layer before persistence.

The CampaignService.createCampaign does not perform transaction boundary validation within the list loop if any subsequent validation fails; though it is annotated with @Transactional at the service/test layer, any programmatic batching might need careful partial error handling or bulk insert optimization.
